sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85952" key="potamo/rrutos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ποτᾰμόρρῠτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype> (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ῥέω</etym>) <sense id="n85952.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">watered by rivers,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1608.tlg001:p.103B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PS</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.103B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> <sense n="II" id="n85952.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">washed down by rivers,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κασσίτερος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0068.tlg001:165" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Scymn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">165</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
